title: SenZee Spray Bottles for Hair 500ml, Misting Water Spray Bottle for Hair Cleaning Hairdresser Refillable Clear Empty Trigger Sprayer 2 Pack
features: 💦【Package content】You will receive 2 pack 500ml spray bottles for hair, enough capacity for hair styling and daily cleaning. Each with a portable size of 25 * 7cm, makes it convenient to carry with.

💦【Adjustable Nozzle】The nozzle of our spray bottles is designed with an adjustment knob, which provides three modes of closing, water spray and misting spray. Just gently rotate the nozzle to control.
💦【Leak-proof Design】The spiral neck design of the water spray bottle for hair makes it have better sealing performance, and it will not leak no matter what angle you hold it at.
💦【High Quality】Our misting spray bottle is made of high quality PET plastic, which is sturdy, durable, and not easy to break, and can be reused after filling.
💦【Wide Application】Our hair spray bottle is suitable for hair styling, house cleaning, moistening garden plants, ironing or as a portable travel container.
